diagrams.title: Union of Languages
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the union of two languages as combining all strings from both languages into one set.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of union of languages

diagrams.title: Intersection of Languages
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the intersection of two languages as finding the common strings between the two languages.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of intersection of languages

diagrams.title: Concatenation of Languages
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the concatenation of two languages as combining strings from one language with strings from another language.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of concatenation of languages

diagrams.title: Kleene Star of a Language
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the Kleene star of a language as creating a new language with all possible combinations of strings from the original language.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of Kleene star of a language
